# Evaluation Guide for Online Fraud Solutions

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Your business must ensure a gold-standard customer experience without increasing exposure to fraud. When you adopt a trust and safety solution built with control and transparency in mind, it equips you to securely drive expansion and grow revenue.

Use this guide to understand different types of fraud solutions, how they stack up against each other, and critical questions to ask during the exploration process.

Download our _Evaluation guide for online fraud solutions_ to discover:

*   A breakdown of the common types of fraud solutions
*   Questions to guide your search when comparing solution capabilities
*   An evaluation checklist to help you find the right fraud solution for your business
